candidate_problems.text: Test whether loss-centered constraint structure versus generalized agency-collapse structure better predicts treatment response, time course, and relapse than symptom checklists alone.
Determine how to classify mixed cases where bereavement triggers a state that begins as grief but becomes robust to removal of loss-centered cues.
Identify whether retained capacity for meaning and fluctuation with reminders are genuinely load-bearing discriminators across cultures and age groups.
